arts.ttl: Omar Marmoush - Man City complete signing of Frankfurt's prolific Egyptian forward
arts.sum: Omar Marmoush has stood out as one of the Bundesliga's brightest stars in the first half of the season for Eintracht Frankfurt. The Egyptian striker, who also has a Canadian...

arts.ttl: Omar Marmoush says goodbye to Eintracht Frankfurt after Manchester City move confirmed
arts.sum: Fare thee well, Omar Marmoush: the Eintracht Frankfurt forward, who lit up the Bundesliga with his insatiable thirst for goals and assists, is on his way to Manchester City after bidding an emotional auf Wiedersehen at Deutsche Bank Park. The Egyptian magician certainly left a mark on his time in Germany's top flight and, in particular, with Eintracht, for whom his all-star performances have helped the team from Mainhatten to challenge at the top of the standings this term .

arts.ttl: Man City confirm £64m Omar Marmoush signing as third January signing arrives
arts.sum: The Egypt international can play across the front line

arts.ttl: Manchester City complete signing of Omar Marmoush from Eintracht Frankfurt
arts.sum: The 25-year-old has signed a four-and-a-half-year contract with the champions.

arts.ttl: Man City announce £59m signing of Omar Marmoush from Eintracht Frankfurt
arts.sum: Manchester City have officially announced the arrival of Omar Marmoush from Eintracht Frankfurt.

arts.ttl: The surprise, late rise of Man City newcomer Omar Marmoush
arts.sum: It's been a circuitous route to the top for Omar Marmoush but, at the age of 25, he has finally arrived after a €60m transfer to Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Man City sign in-form Frankfurt star Omar Marmoush
arts.sum: Manchester City have completed the signing of Eintracht Frankfurt forward Omar Marmoush, the club announced on Thursday.
In praise of Omar Marmoush following his record-breaking time in Frankfurt.

arts.ttl: Man City complete signing of Eintracht Frankfurt forward Omar Marmoush
arts.sum: The club have taken their spending past £120m for Pep Guardiola’s mid-season rebuild

arts.ttl: Omar Marmoush officially joins Man City: How does "top-class" Egyptian forward compare to Julian Alvarez?
arts.sum: Manchester City officially announce the signing of attacker Omar Marmoush from Eintracht Frankfurt.
